_meta.description: Per-language AAC phrase patterns that the morphology engine cannot produce via buildSentence(). Each pattern has placeholders like {body}, {person}, {object} that are resolved at runtime from the lexicon.

body_pain._doc: '{body} hurts' — each language has its own idiom for body pain

body_pain_intensity._doc: Body pain + intensity (very / a little / not anymore)

body_parts._doc: Localized body-part names for phrase substitution

body_parts_locative._doc: Locative forms for French 'à la/au/aux' and Spanish 'el/la' etc.

want_verb_object._doc: 'I want to {verb} {object}' — delegates verb inflection to morphology engine

person_names._doc: Localized person names for substitution into templates

food_drink_items._doc: Localized food/drink names for template substitution

objects._doc: Common object names (with article as appropriate)

sub_places._doc: Localized sub-place names + locative forms for navigation templates

recess.ja: 休み時間はいつですか？

ja: 誰か助けてくれますか？
どうやって行きますか？
もらってもいいですか？
もう一度言ってくれますか？
